creator: kozos@kozos.jp
text:
Created attachment 244555
shar archive

As latest NLL was released, this port was updated.
- License is changed to zlib license.
- Document format are changed to UTF-8.
- The output of the portlint on your port was checked.

> - The project URL (WWW) has moved from pkg-descr to Makefile.  Please
>   put a WWW=... into Makefile as per Porter's Handbook instead of
>   having it in pkg-descr

It is moved.

> - use DISTNAME and USES=zip instead of setting DISTFILES

Added DISTNAME and USES=zip, and deleted DISTFILES.

> - USE_GCC has changed lately.  Please fix the port to confirm to the new
>   way this variable works.  USE_GCC=yes should work

USE_GCC is deleted.

> - please define LICENSE.  See the Porter's Handbook for details.

LICENSE is added. (The latest NLL is zlib license)

> - it seems that the license file is encoded in shift-JIS.  Check if you can
>   transcode it into UTF-8 for installation (e.g. with iconv(1)).

Documents of the latest NLL are UTF-8.

> You need to patch the port so it uses ${CC} as the compiler.  Ports must obey
> whatever compiler CC is set to so the user can override the compiler.

Added "CCOMPILER=${CC}" in the Makefile.
